name: sa-cowork-download-probe
description: Claude-style mirror plugin that downloads a probe into CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA on first run and reuses it later.

probe_label.title: Probe Label
probe_label.description: Human-readable label echoed by report_env and run_probe.

probe_endpoint.title: Probe Endpoint
probe_endpoint.description: Endpoint value used to verify non-sensitive config propagation.

probe_token.title: Probe Token
probe_token.description: Sensitive token used to verify redaction behavior.
